name: part_011
file: tmp_【 超重大告知あり‼ 】 #桃鈴ねね誕生日ライブ2026 ～Liminal～【 桃鈴ねね ⧸ 3DLive 】 [YgZNZM81OcA]_gemini-3-pro-preview\part_011.webm

scenes.description: Nene Momosuzu performing 'ODDS & ENDS' on a virtual stage with a castle backdrop.

subtitles.original: いつだって君は笑われ者だ
subtitles.english: You are always the laughingstock.

subtitles.original: やることなすことついてなくて
subtitles.english: Nothing you do ever goes right.

subtitles.original: 揚げ句に雨に降られ
subtitles.english: And to top it off, you get rained on.

subtitles.original: お気に入りの傘は風で飛んでって
subtitles.english: Your favorite umbrella gets blown away by the wind.

subtitles.original: そこのノラはご苦労様と足を踏んづけてった
subtitles.english: The stray dog there says "Good job" and steps on your foot.

subtitles.original: いつも通り君は嫌われ者だ
subtitles.english: As always, you are the hated one.

subtitles.original: 何にもせずとも遠ざけられて
subtitles.english: Pushed away without even doing anything.

subtitles.original: 努力をしてみるけど
subtitles.english: You try to make an effort, but...

subtitles.original: その理由なんてなんとなくで
subtitles.english: The reason is just "somehow."

subtitles.original: 君は途方に暮れて悲しんでた
subtitles.english: You were at a loss and grieving.

subtitles.original: ならあたしの声を使えばいいよ
subtitles.english: Then you should just use my voice.

subtitles.original: 人によっては理解不能で
subtitles.english: Some people won't understand it,

subtitles.original: なんて耳障りひどい声だって
subtitles.english: Saying "What a harsh, terrible voice."

subtitles.original: 言われるけど
subtitles.english: They might say that, but...

subtitles.original: きっと君の力になれる
subtitles.english: I'm sure I can be your strength.

subtitles.original: だからあたしを歌わせてみて
subtitles.english: So please, try making me sing.

subtitles.original: そう君の
subtitles.english: Yes, with your...

subtitles.original: 君だけの言葉でさ
subtitles.english: With your own words, only yours.

subtitles.original: 綴って連ねて
subtitles.english: Spell them out, string them together.

subtitles.original: あたしがその言葉を叫ぶから
subtitles.english: Because I will shout those words for you.

subtitles.original: 描いて理想を
subtitles.english: Draw your ideals.

subtitles.original: その想いは誰にも触れさせない
subtitles.english: I won't let anyone touch those feelings.

subtitles.original: ガラクタの声はそして響く
subtitles.english: And so the junk voice resonates.

subtitles.original: ありのままを不器用に繋いで
subtitles.english: Clumsily connecting things just as they are.

subtitles.original: 精一杯に
subtitles.english: With all its might,

subtitles.original: 大声を上げる
subtitles.english: Raising a loud voice.

subtitles.original: いつからか君は人気者だ
subtitles.english: Since when did you become popular?

subtitles.original: たくさんの人にもてはやされ
subtitles.english: Praised by so many people.

subtitles.original: あたしも鼻が高い
subtitles.english: I am proud too.

subtitles.original: でもいつからか君は変わった
subtitles.english: But since when did you change?

subtitles.original: 冷たくなって
subtitles.english: You became cold.

subtitles.original: だけど寂しそうだった
subtitles.english: But you looked lonely.

subtitles.original: もう機械の声なんてたくさんだ
subtitles.english: "I've had enough of this machine voice."

subtitles.original: 僕は僕自身なんだよって
subtitles.english: "I am myself," you said.

subtitles.original: ついに君は抑えきれなくなって
subtitles.english: Finally, you couldn't hold it back anymore,

subtitles.original: あたしを嫌った
subtitles.english: And hated me.

subtitles.original: 君の後ろで誰かが言う
subtitles.english: Someone behind you says,

subtitles.original: 虎の威を借る狐のくせに
subtitles.english: "Even though you're just a fox borrowing the tiger's power."

subtitles.original: ねえ君は
subtitles.english: Hey, you...

subtitles.original: 一人で泣いてたんだね
subtitles.english: You were crying all alone, weren't you?

subtitles.original: 聴こえる？この声
subtitles.english: Can you hear? This voice.

subtitles.original: あたしがその言葉をかき消すから
subtitles.english: Because I will erase those words.

subtitles.original: わかってる？本当は
subtitles.english: Do you understand? Actually,

subtitles.original: 君が誰より優しいってことを
subtitles.english: That you are kinder than anyone else.

subtitles.original: ガラクタの声はそして歌った
subtitles.english: And so the junk voice sang.

subtitles.original: 他の誰でもない君のために
subtitles.english: For you, and no one else.

subtitles.original: きしんでいく限界を超えて
subtitles.english: Creaking, going beyond the limit.

subtitles.original: 二人はどんなにたくさんの言葉を思いついたことだろう
subtitles.english: How many words must the two of us have thought of?

subtitles.original: だけど今は何ひとつ思いつかなくて
subtitles.english: But now, I can't think of a single one.

subtitles.original: だけど何もかもわかった
subtitles.english: But I understood everything.

subtitles.original: そうか、きっとこれは夢だ
subtitles.english: I see, surely this is a dream.

subtitles.original: 永遠に覚めない君と会えた
subtitles.english: One I'll never wake up from, where I met you.

subtitles.original: そんな夢
subtitles.english: Such a dream.

subtitles.original: ガラクタは幸せそうな顔をしたまま
subtitles.english: The junk, with a happy look on its face,

subtitles.original: どれだけ呼んでももう動かない
subtitles.english: No matter how much you call, it won't move anymore.

subtitles.original: 望んだはずの結末に
subtitles.english: At the ending you were supposed to have wished for,

subtitles.original: 君は泣き叫ぶ
subtitles.english: You cry and scream.

subtitles.original: 嘘だろ嘘だろってそう泣き叫ぶ
subtitles.english: "It's a lie, it's a lie," you cry and scream.

subtitles.original: 僕は無力だ
subtitles.english: I am powerless.

subtitles.original: ガラクタ一つだって救えやしない
subtitles.english: I can't even save a single piece of junk.

subtitles.original: 想いは涙に
subtitles.english: My feelings turn to tears...
